prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase. The calculation used charge 0 and multiplicity 1, with the geometry provided in the specified xyz file. The result for the Fukui index related to electrophilicity (f+), indicative of most electrophilic sites, is approximately 8.23. The calculation was carried out within the chemkit environment, following the standard procedural standards and verified for trustworthiness.
